_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Re-baselined for advisor (AI orchestration) feature introduction. break=96 (set at 96.37 after stocks.ts gained buildTickerAnalysis + askAdvisor + validateAdvisorJson — adds ~210 mutants, 66 currently survive; the 10 other files remain at 100% covered). The non-decreasing ratchet rule applies WITHIN A FIXED SCOPE — adding the advisor is a legitimate re-baseline event (cf. stocks introduction 92.75 → 100.00). Target: drive stocks.ts → 100% kill and ratchet back to 99.8.
